name: Virtual Tee Systems
about: Virtual Tee Systems is a premier provider of custom golf simulators, specializing in high-end installations for residential and commercial spaces. They offer a comprehensive suite of equipment from leading brands like Trackman, Uneekor, and Foresight, catering to both serious golfers and leisure users. The company operates across multiple locations in the lower 48 states, with a focus on creating luxury, high-performance indoor golf experiences tailored to each client's specific needs and space constraints. They provide expert guidance throughout the entire process, from initial planning and equipment selection to final integration and installation.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium technology with top-tier launch monitors from brands like Trackman, Uneekor, and Foresight
Customizable installations designed for optimal performance and luxury feel
Comprehensive nationwide service and expert support throughout the build process

food_and_drink.notes: Bar and kitchen facilities available for in-simulator dining
Full bar service available for creating a complete golf simulator bar experience

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitor for accurate ball and club tracking
High-speed camera launch monitor for detailed swing analysis
Camera-based launch monitoring system with high accuracy

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players typically bring their own golf clubs to use with the simulators. The system is designed to work with standard golf clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are generally not permitted. Each simulator bay has a full bar and kitchen facilities available for ordering food and drinks during your session.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes on a simulator typically takes 1.5 to 2.5 hours, depending on the number of players in your group and how quickly you play.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Virtual Tee Systems is family-friendly. Their custom simulators and social atmosphere make it a suitable venue for families to enjoy golf together.
